commit_scope: The tagged value ABI ships in the fourth sibling's multi-function, universal, and jit lanes: table raw, LIT encodes on read, refs odd, EMPTY = 1 = the null reference = axiom-1's NOTHING. Matched-0 and nothing are distinct through plain IF; every prior parity unchanged; the quine's single lane stays raw by design.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-os-band.fk
local_validation.summary: All five fourth-kernel bands three-way green after the ABI (os 15 re-pinned 4327/4242 with the lowering canonical updated to (2 + a) — the band caught the encoding honestly; heap 15 unchanged str_find claims; call 15; emit 7 and fixpoint 15 on the raw single lane). Full audit exit 0: fib 317811 on every carrier, sibling heap value 25 unchanged, bmf 22/202, organs 7, self-JIT cold 28.0 ms -> hot 4.7 ms parity held, quine byte-exact 3388. The new claim, witnessed: matched-0 -> 0 and no-match -> 1 (the null reference) distinct through plain IF — the ack gap closed; {nothing, 0, 1, node} = {null-ref, int-0, int-1, ref}, protocol and ABI one shape. A first replace over-reached into the raw quine lane (m4c parity 754 caught by the audit's gate) and was reverted — the parity-first protocol did its job.

observed_delta.bands: os 15, heap 15, call 15, emit 7, fixpoint 15 — 0 divergent
observed_delta.parities_unchanged: fib 317811, heap 25, bmf 22/202, organs 7, quine 3388 bytes

known_limitations.limitation: fk_pv prints nothing as 1 — same glyph as int 1 at the display layer only (values are distinct in the ABI).
known_limitations.follow_up: A ref-prefixing printer when display ambiguity ever matters.

known_limitations.limitation: The quine single lane stays raw ints-only by design; it gains the ABI when the self-printer learns refs.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run all bands three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib rides the api rebuild; lattice ingests the spec on merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route changes. The sibling's values are tagged: nothing is the null reference, zero is data, refs are node-acks — the ack vocabulary physical, the flattener's ground ready.
test_flows: Five bands three-way; audit end-to-end with the zero-vs-nothing witness and all prior parities.

phase_gate.gate: acks physical with all prior parities unchanged; CI + deploy confirm
phase_gate.next: m4e3 — the real-recipe flattener through the observe door onto cursor + heap + honest acks
